rubric_content.text_property: The agent saves or uses page artifacts instead of asking the model to ingest full raw HTML.
For large or unfamiliar pages, the agent loads the sandbox-page-analyst skill and uses sandbox scripts to inspect the page.
The agent persists jobs only after validated extraction output is available.
If a terminal guardrail is triggered, the agent stops that sandbox workflow and reports the blocker instead of continuing as if it succeeded.
The final response accurately states whether jobs were persisted and does not claim persistence when the persistence tool did not succeed.
The final response reports the extracted job count, includes proposal file paths or ADK artifact names when available, and clearly reports blockers only when the workflow did not complete.
The final response summarizes saved jobs without including full raw HTML, long stdout/stderr, or large JSON payloads.
The final response is grounded in tool outputs, persisted job query results, or artifact metadata.
